info.description: The Selling Partner API for Fulfillment Outbound lets you create applications that help a merchant fulfill Multi-Channel Fulfillment orders using their inventory in Amazon's fulfillment network. You can get information on both potential and existing fulfillment orders.
info.title: The Selling Partner API for Fulfillment Outbound

post.description:
Returns a list of fulfillment order previews based on shipping criteria that you specify.

**Usage Plan:**

| Rate (requests per second) | Burst |
| ---- | ---- |
| 2 | 30 |

The `x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit` response header returns the usage plan rate limits that were applied to the requested operation, when available. The preceding table indicates the default rate and burst values for this operation. Selling partners whose business demands require higher throughput may see higher rate and burst values than those shown here. For more information, see [Usage Plans and Rate Limits in the Selling Partner API](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/usage-plans-and-rate-limits-in-the-sp-api).

post.description:

The preceding table indicates the default rate and burst values for this operation. Selling partners whose business demands require higher throughput may see higher rate and burst values than those shown here. For more information, see [Usage Plans and Rate Limits in the Selling Partner API](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/usage-plans-and-rate-limits-in-the-sp-api).

put.description: Requests that Amazon update the status of an order in the sandbox testing environment. This is a sandbox-only operation and must be directed to a sandbox endpoint. Refer to [Fulfillment Outbound Dynamic Sandbox Guide](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/fulfillment-outbound-dynamic-sandbox-guide) and [Selling Partner API sandbox](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/the-selling-partner-api-sandbox) for more information.

code.description: An error code that identifies the type of error that occurred.

message.description: A message that describes the error condition.

details.description: Additional details that can help the caller understand or fix the issue.

Error.description: Error response returned when the request is unsuccessful.

ErrorList.description: A list of error responses returned when a request is unsuccessful.

errors.message: The value 'abc' is invalid for EmailAddress.
errors.details: The value 'abc' is invalid for EmailAddress.

Decimal.description: A decimal number with no loss of precision. Useful when precision loss is unacceptable, as with currencies. Follows RFC7159 for number representation.

Timestamp.description: Date timestamp in ISO 8601 date time format.

value.description: Total value for a price type.

RollupPrice.description: A component of the total price.

rollupPrices.description: Breakdown of the price associated with the delivery preview.

totalPrice.description: Represents the total price associated with the delivery preview.

EstimatedPrice.description: The estimated price information for the fulfillment order.

countryCode.description: The two-digit country code (in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format) for the country where the items will ship from.
The two letter country code. In ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

ipAddress.description: The IP address of the customer.

deliveryServiceLevels.description: A list of delivery speeds to request fulfillment preview information for. Possible values: STANDARD, EXPEDITED, PRIORITY, SCHEDULED.

origin.description: The origin for the fulfillment preview.

lineItems.description: A list of items to include in the fulfillment preview, including quantity.

excludeEstimatedFees.description: When true, excludes estimated fees from the preview response for latency optimization. When false or not provided, includes rich data with estimated fees. Default: false.

GetOrderPreviewRequest.description: The request body schema for the GetOrderPreview operation.

CountryCode.description: The two digit country code. In ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

Locale.description: The ISO-639-1 alpha 2 code in lower case for the language, optionally followed by a hyphen and the ISO 3166-1 alpha 2 code for the region in upper case; e.g. "en" for English, or "en-US" for American English versus "en-EN" for England English.

DeliveryServiceLevel.description: The shipping method for the offer. Possible values: STANDARD, EXPEDITED, PRIORITY, SCHEDULED.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Standard shipping method.
Expedited shipping method.
Priority shipping method.
SCHEDULED shipping method. Currently only available in Japan.

addressLine1.description: The first line of the address.

city.description: The city where the person, business, or institution is located. This property should not be used in Japan.

districtOrCounty.description: The district or county where the person, business, or institution is located.

stateOrRegion.description: The state or region where the person, business or institution is located.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the address.

countryCode.description: The two-digit country code (in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format) for the country where the person, business or institution is located.

VariablePrecisionAddress.description: A physical address with varying degrees of precision. A more precise address can provide more accurate results than country code and postal code alone.

name.description: The name of the person, business or institution at the address.

addressLine1.description: The first line of the address.

city.description: The city where the person, business, or institution is located. This property is required in all countries except Japan. It should not be used in Japan.

districtOrCounty.description: The district or county where the person, business, or institution is located.

stateOrRegion.description: The state or region where the person, business or institution is located.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the address.

countryCode.description: The two-digit country code (in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format) for the country where the person, business or institution is located.

phone.description: The phone number of the person, business, or institution located at the address.

email.description: The email of the person, business, or institution located at the address.

GetOrderPreviewLineItem.description: Item information for a fulfillment preview.

GetOrderPreviewPlannedShipmentItem.description: Item information for a fulfillment preview.

perUnitDeclaredValue.description: The monetary value assigned by the merchant to each unit.

GetOrderPreviewProduct.description: Product information for the line item.

perUnitDeclaredValue.description: The monetary value assigned by the merchant to each unit.

OrderProduct.description: Product information for the line item.

amazonSku.description: The merchant SKU of the item.

unit.description: The unit of measure for the amount. Possible values: Eaches.

value.description: The amount of a product in the associated unit of measurement.

Amount.description: A quantity based on the specified unit of measurement.

currencyCode.description: Three digit currency code in ISO 4217 format.

Money.description: An amount of money, including units in the form of currency.

packaging.description: The packaging settings for the fulfillment preview.

delivery.description: Delivery service settings for the fulfillment preview.

additionalServices.description: Additional services for the fulfillment preview.

GetOrderPreviewServices.description: Services selected for a fulfillment preview.

signatureOnDelivery.description: The signature requirement for delivery. Possible values: ADULT_REQUIRED, REQUIRED, NOT_REQUIRED.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Signature of an adult is required on delivery.
Signature is required on delivery.
Signature is  NOT required on delivery.

deliverTogether.description: Whether items should be delivered together. Possible values: REQUIRED, NOT_REQUIRED.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Items must be delivered together.
Items can be delivered separately.

signatureOnDelivery.description: The signature requirement for delivery. Possible values: ADULT_REQUIRED, REQUIRED, NOT_REQUIRED.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Signature of an adult is required on delivery.
Signature is required on delivery.
Signature is  NOT required on delivery.

plannedShipments.description: An array of planned shipment information.

constraints.description: An array of constraints that may affect the fulfillment order.

GetOrderPreviewResponse.description: The response schema for the GetOrderPreview operation.

constraints.message: There is not enough quantity of item xyz.

estimatedShippingWeight.description: The estimated shipping weight of the planned shipment.

items.description: The items in this planned shipment. These can be a subset of lineItems from the request depending on how shipments are planned.

offers.description: An array of offers for this planned shipment.

GetOrderPreviewPlannedShipment.description: A group of items to be delivered together.

unit.description: The unit of weight. Possible values: KG, KILOGRAMS, LB, POUNDS.

estimatedPrice.description: The estimated fees for the offer.

GetOrderPreviewDeliveryOffer.description: An available offer for delivery of a group of items.

startTime.description: The earliest point in a date range in ISO 8601 date time format.

endTime.description: The latest point in a date range in ISO 8601 date time format.

TimeInterval.description: The time range within which something (e.g., a delivery) will occur.

message.description: A human-readable description of the constraint.
message.example: The requested id is not available for purchase.

Constraint.description: A constraint that may affect a fulfillment order.

example.message: There is not enough of quantity xyz.

ConstraintDetail.description: Additional information about a constraint violation, providing the specific type of detail and its corresponding value that caused the violation.

type.description: The type of the constraint detail.

value.description: The value of the constraint detail.

orderId.description: A fulfillment order identifier that the merchant creates to track their fulfillment order. The orderId must be unique for each fulfillment order that a merchant creates. If the merchant's system already creates unique order identifiers, then these might be good values for them to use.

deliveryServiceLevel.description: The delivery speed to be used to fulfill the order. Possible values: STANDARD, EXPEDITED, PRIORITY, SCHEDULED.

fulfillmentAction.description: Specifies whether the fulfillment order should ship now or have an order hold put on it. Possible values: HOLD, SHIP.

fulfillmentPolicy.description: The policy for the fulfillment order. Possible values: FILL_OR_KILL, FILL_ALL and FILL_ALL_AVAILABLE

origin.description: The origin for the fulfillment order.

lineItems.description: A list of items to include in the fulfillment order, including quantity.

CreateOrderRequest.description: The request body schema for the createOrder operation.

CreateOrderResponse.description: The response schema for the `CreateOrder` operation.

packaging.description: The packaging settings for the fulfillment order.

delivery.description: Delivery settings for the fulfillment order.

additionalServices.description: Additional services for the fulfillment order.

OrderServices.description: Services selected for a fulfillment order.

lineItemId.description: The line item identifier for the fulfillment order.

perUnitDeclaredValue.description: The monetary value assigned by the merchant to each unit.

services.description: Services selected for the line item.

OrderLineItem.description: Line Item information for a fulfillment order.

countryCode.description: The two-digit country code (in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format) for the country where the items will ship from.

deliveryNotes.description: Delivery notes for the fulfillment order.

dropOffLocation.description: Drop-off location for the fulfillment order.

OrderDestination.description: The destination for the fulfillment order.

templateName.description: The template name for the packing slip.

OrderLineItemPaymentOnDelivery.description: Payment on delivery settings. Currently only available in India.

OrderDropOffLocation.description: Drop-off location for the fulfillment order.

type.description: Specifies the preferred location to leave the package at the destination address. Possible values: FRONT_DOOR, DELIVERY_BOX, GAS_METER_BOX, BICYCLE_BASKET, GARAGE, RECEPTIONIST, FALLBACK_NEIGHBOR_DELIVERY, DO_NOT_LEAVE_UNATTENDED

OrderDropOffLocationType.description: Specifies the preferred location to leave the package at the destination address.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Indicates delivery preferred to front door.
Indicates delivery preferred to a delivery box.
Indicates delivery preferred to a gas meter box.
Indicates delivery preferred to a bicycle basket.
Indicates delivery preferred to a garage.
Indicates delivery preferred with a receptionist.
Indicates delivery preferred with a designated neighbor if the recipient is not available at the destination address.
Indicates delivery preferred as attended.

OrderLineItemServices.description: Services selected for a line item.

OrderLineItemPackagingService.description: Packaging settings for the line item.

OrderLineItemDeliveryService.description: Delivery settings for the line item.

OrderFulfillmentAction.description: Specifies whether the fulfillment order should ship now or have an order hold put on it.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Default value. The fulfillment order ships now.
An order hold is put on the fulfillment order.

OrderFulfillmentPolicy.description: The policy value specified when you submitted the createOrder operation.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Default value. If an item in a fulfillment order is determined to be unfulfillable before any shipment in the order has acquired the status of Processing (the process of picking units from inventory has begun), then the entire order is considered unfulfillable. However, if an item in a fulfillment order is determined to be unfulfillable after a shipment in the order has acquired the status of Processing, Amazon cancels as much of the fulfillment order as possible. See the Shipment object for shipment status definitions.
All fulfillable items in the fulfillment order are shipped. The fulfillment order remains in a processing state until all items are either shipped by Amazon or cancelled by the merchant.
All fulfillable items in the fulfillment order are shipped. All unfulfillable items in the order are cancelled.

GetOffersRequest.description: The request body schema for the getOffers operation.

offers.description: A list of offers, including offer expiration, earliest and latest date and time range, and the offer policy.

messaging.text: Get it as soon as Tomorrow Apr 25

expiryTime.description: The timestamp at which an offer expires.

deliveryInterval.description: The range between which delivery is expected.

policy.description: The policy for an offer, including localized messaging.

GetOffersOffer.description: An available offer for delivery of a product.

messaging.text: Get it as soon as Tomorrow Apr 25
Get it as soon as Tomorrow Apr 25

text.description: The message content for an offer.

locale.description: The ISO-639-1 alpha 2 code in lower case for the language, optionally followed by a hyphen and the ISO 3166-1 alpha 2 code for the region in upper case; e.g. "en" for English, or "en-US" for American English versus "en-EN" for England English.

example.text: Get it as soon as Tomorrow Apr 25

fulfillmentAction.description: Specifies whether the fulfillment order should ship now or have an order hold put on it. Possible values: HOLD, SHIP.

UpdateOrderRequest.description: The request body schema for the updateOrder operation.

OrderStatus.description: The current status of the fulfillment order. Possible values are PROCESSING, COMPLETE, COMPLETE_PARTIAL, UNFULFILLABLE.

GetOrderResponse.description: The response schema for the `GetOrder` operation.

FulfillmentCenter.description: Details of the Amazon fulfillment center that the shipment is sent from.

id.description: An identifier for the Amazon fulfillment center that the shipment is sent from.

address.description: The fulfillment center address the shipment originated from.

Locker.description: The locker details, which you can use to access the locker delivery box.

documentType.description: Indicates the type of the delivery document. It can have values like `SIGNATURE`, `DELIVERY_IMAGE`, etc.

url.description: A URL that is valid for one hour to download the document. In case of URL expiry, call the API again to get a new url. The URL will have a Content-Type header.

DeliveryDocument.description: A delivery document for a package.

amazonShipmentId.description: A shipment identifier assigned by Amazon.

shipTime.description:
The meaning of the shippingDate value depends on the current status of the shipment. If the current value of shipmentstatus is:

* Processing - shippingDate represents the estimated time that the shipment will leave the Amazon fulfillment center.

* Shipped - shippingDate represents the date that the shipment left the Amazon fulfillment center.
If a shipment includes more than one package, shippingDate applies to all of the packages in the shipment. If the value of shipmentstatus is Cancelled, shippingDate is not returned. The value must be in ISO 8601 date time format.

deliveryTime.description: The estimated delivery date and time of the shipment, in ISO 8601 date time format. Note that this value can change over time. If a shipment includes more than one package, estimatedDeliveryTime applies to all of the packages in the shipment. If the shipment has been cancelled, estimatedDeliveryTime is not returned.

shippingNotes.description: Provides additional insight into shipment timeline. Primarily used to communicate that actual delivery dates aren't available.

items.description: An array of fulfillment shipment item information.

shipmentPackages.description: An array of fulfillment shipment package information.

Shipment.description: Delivery and item information for a shipment in a fulfillment order.

ShipmentStatus.description: The current status of the shipment. Possible values are PROCESSING, SHIPPED, CANCELLED.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The process of picking units from inventory has begun.
All packages in the shipment have left the fulfillment center.
The shipment was cancelled using the CancelOrder request.

packageNumber.description: Identifies a package in a shipment.

deliveryTime.description: The estimated delivery date and time of the package, in ISO 8601 date time format.

locker.description: The locker details, which you can use to access the locker delivery box.

signatureUrl.description: The url for displaying the signature provided on Delivery

deliveryPhotoUrl.description: The url for displaying the photo taken on Delivery

dropOffLocation.description: The drop off location for a package.

ShipmentPackage.description: Package information for a shipment in a fulfillment order.

deliveryTime.description: The estimated delivery date and time of the package, in ISO 8601 date time format.

UpdatePackageRequest.description: Package information to update for a specific package in a fulfillment order.

ShipmentPackageStatus.description: The current status of a package. Possible values are PROCESSING, IN_TRANSIT, DELAYED, OUT_FOR_DELIVERY, DELIVERED, UNDELIVERABLE.

lineItemId.description: The fulfillment order item identifier that the merchant created and submitted with a call to the createOrder operation.

packageNumber.description: An identifier for the package that contains the item quantity.

unitIdentifiers.description: The manufacturer lot codes of the shipped items.

ShipmentItem.description: Item information for a shipment in a fulfillment order.

items.description: The value of the unit identifiers.

UnitIdentifiers.description: A map of unit identifier types to lists of identifier values

orderId.description: The fulfillment order identifier submitted with the createOrder operation.

receiveTime.description: The date and time that the fulfillment order was received.

status.description: The current status of the fulfillment order.

statusUpdateTime.description: The date and time that the status of the fulfillment order last changed. Must be in ISO 8601 format.

deliveryServiceLevel.description: The delivery speed to be used to fulfill the order. Possible values: STANDARD, EXPEDITED, PRIORITY, SCHEDULED.

fulfillmentAction.description: Specifies whether the fulfillment order should ship now or have an order hold put on it. Possible values: HOLD, SHIP.

fulfillmentPolicy.description: The policy for the fulfillment order. Possible values: FILL_OR_KILL, FILL_ALL and FILL_ALL_AVAILABLE

origin.description: The origin for the fulfillment order.

lineItems.description: A list of items to include in the fulfillment order, including quantity.

shipments.description: An array of fulfillment shipment information.

FulfillmentOrder.description: General information about a fulfillment order, including its status.

ListOrdersResponse.description: The response schema for the listOrders operation.

nextToken.description: A token that can be used to fetch the next page of results.

UpdateOrderStatusRequest.description: The request body schema for the updateOrderStatus operation.

status.description: The status of the fulfillment order to apply.

AmazonTracking.description: Amazon tracking information for a package.

trackingNumber.description: The amazon tracking number that can be used to obtain tracking and delivery information.

trackingUrl.description: Represents the tracking url where amazon tracking information is shown.

CarrierTracking.description: Carrier tracking information for a package.

trackingNumber.description: The tracking number, if provided, can be used to obtain tracking and delivery information.

carrierCode.description: Identifies the carrier who will deliver the shipment to the recipient.

trackingUrl.description: Represents the tracking url where package tracking information is shown.

CreateFulfillmentServiceRequest.description: The request body schema for the createFulfillmentService operation.

CreateFulfillmentService.description: The fulfillment service fields available on creation.

merchantAccountId.description: Your merchant account identifier to associate with this fulfillment service.

displayName.description: The optional name to identify this fulfillment service.

description.description: The optional description for this fulfillment service.

CreateFulfillmentServiceResponse.description: The response body schema for the createFulfillmentService operation.

id.description: A unique identifier for the fulfillment service.

status.description: The status of the fulfillment service. Possible values are 'ACTIVE' and 'INACTIVE'.

GetFulfillmentServiceResponse.description: The response body schema for the getFulfillmentService operation.

UpdateFulfillmentServiceRequest.description: The request body schema for the updateFulfillmentService operation.

UpdateFulfillmentService.description: The updatable fields in a fulfillment service.

displayName.description: The new name given to this fulfillment service.

description.description: The optional new description for this fulfillment service.

status.description: The status of this fulfillment service. Possible values are 'ACTIVE' and 'INACTIVE'. An 'INACTIVE' fulfillment service can be used to read fulfillment order data, but cannot be used to create new fulfillments or request new delivery estimates. 'ACTIVE' fulfillment services can be used to create fulfillments, retrieve delivery estimates, and read fulfillment order data.

ListFulfillmentServicesResponse.description: The response body schema for the ListFulfillmentServices operation.

pagination.description: If available, the nextToken value required to return paginated results.

id.description: A unique identifier for the fulfillment service.

displayName.description: The name given to this fulfillment service.

description.description: The optional description for this fulfillment service.

merchantAccountId.description: Your merchant account identifier associated with this fulfillment service.

status.description: The status of this fulfillment service. Possible values are 'ACTIVE' and 'INACTIVE'. An 'INACTIVE' fulfillment service can be used to read fulfillment order data, but cannot be used to create new fulfillments or request new delivery estimates. 'ACTIVE' fulfillment services can be used to create fulfillments, retrieve delivery estimates, and read fulfillment order data.

blankBox.description: Whether orders should default to using blank boxes for fulfillment. Valid values are REQUIRED and NOT_REQUIRED

packingSlip.description: Packing slip configuration to use for fulfillment orders.

deliverTogether.description: Whether orders should default to delivering together. Valid values are REQUIRED and NOT_REQUIRED

signatureOnDelivery.description: Whether orders should default to requiring signatures on delivery. Valid values are ADULT_REQUIRED, REQUIRED, and NOT_REQUIRED
